emergent_themes.description: Users who have completely systematized food through outsourcing (meal prep, delivery) to eliminate decision-making and effort
Platform loyalty driven by integration with broader life systems (transport, travel, loyalty programs) rather than food quality alone
Food decisions prioritizing time/effort optimization over taste, health, or enjoyment
Small inconveniences (£1 delivery fee, missing loyalty card integration) creating disproportionate barriers to usage

coding_summary: P002 represents a highly systematized approach to food where delivery serves as a backup to an already outsourced system (meal prep). His platform loyalty is driven by ecosystem integration rather than food experience. Key patterns include extreme efficiency optimization, micro-friction sensitivity, and social-only cooking. His delivery usage is purely functional - triggered by system breakdowns or social occasions.
coverage_gaps: RO3_emotional_social.is_there_stigma_around_solo_ordering_or_ - P002 shows no evidence of stigma around solo ordering; his approach is purely transactional
